prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KARAOKE-KEYBOARD-PARENT Product Type: KARAOKE_MACHINE Brand (from catalog): KidPlay Products Existing Title: KidPlay Products Kids Portable Singing Karaoke Machine with Keyboard and Michrophone, Lights Up Description: Do you have a break out musical rockstar under your roof? If so, the KidPlay Superstar Music Keyboard Karaoke Machine for Kids is the perfect gift to help them express their creativity and practice their passion, whether performing solo or putting on concerts for friends and family.

The kid's karaoke machine with a microphone will turn your little singer into a big Star. With a plug-in microphone, musical keyboard, this portable singing karaoke machine is easy to take just about anywhere for an impromptu performance, making this perfect for parties, the backyard or a rainy day. Search Terms: kids gift christmas karaoke machine microphone for kids system mic stand recording toy mini cheap handheld Features: - COMPACT AND PORTABLE: This singing musical piano is compact and portable with a big built in handle so your little singer can take this anywhere.= - EASY TO USE: Just plug in the microphone and press the music button; change songs by pressing the different keys on the musical keyboard, or just play notes on the musical keyboard - SING OR PLAY MUSIC ON THE PIANO: Your little musician can sing, play music on the piano and dance all at the same time. - EXPRESS THEIR CREATIVITY: A great introduction to music, music theater, singing and performance, if you have a budding musical artist under your roof, the KidPlay Superstar MP3 Music Microphone Stand and Microphone Karaoke Machine is a great gift! With easy assembly, adjust-ability and tons of cool features - SPECIFICATIONS: Material: Plastic; Color: Blue or Pink; Batteries: Included with purchase; Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts); Age: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
